# html-to-markdown

> High-performance HTML to Markdown converter with support for complex HTML structures, tables, and inline images.

## About

html-to-markdown converts HTML to clean Markdown with configurable output styles. Built in Rust with bindings for Python, TypeScript, Go, Java, C#, Ruby, Elixir, PHP, WebAssembly, and C.

## Organization

Part of the kreuzberg.dev ecosystem:
- **Kreuzberg** — Document intelligence: https://github.com/kreuzberg-dev/kreuzberg
- **html-to-markdown** — HTML to Markdown converter (this repo): https://github.com/kreuzberg-dev/html-to-markdown
- **tree-sitter-language-pack** — Universal code parser for 170+ languages: https://github.com/kreuzberg-dev/tree-sitter-language-pack

## Links

- Website: https://kreuzberg.dev
- Documentation: https://docs.html-to-markdown.kreuzberg.dev
- Discord: https://discord.gg/pXxagNK2zN
- Contact: naaman@kreuzberg.dev

## Key APIs

- `convert(html)` — Convert HTML string to Markdown
- `convert_buffer(bytes)` — Convert HTML bytes to Markdown
- `ConversionOptions` — Configure heading style, list indent, code blocks, etc.

## Available From

Python (pip), TypeScript (npm), Rust (crates.io), Go, Java, C#, Ruby, Elixir, PHP, WASM, C, CLI (Homebrew)
